channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dele Momodu Defends Atiku, Says He’s Not Desperate for Power
item.description: Dele Momodu, a prominent African Democratic Congress (ADC) leader, has come to the defense of former Vice President Atiku Abubakar, insisting that Atiku is not desperate for political power ahead of t...

item.title: Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso officially join NDC ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: Peter Obi, wey dey run for President for Labour Party (LP) in 2023, don officially join Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) together with former Kano State governor, Rabiu Kwankwaso. Both of dem registe...

item.title: Stratbase urges PH to pursue secure energy partnerships under Azec
item.description: MANILA — Stratbase Institute, a private think tank, has advised the Philippine government to prioritize energy projects under the Japan-led Asia Zero Emission Community (Azec) instead of pursuing deal...

item.title: LTO orders SUV driver to explain illegal use of red and blue blinkers
item.description: The Land Transportation Office (LTO) has issued a show cause order (SCO) against the driver and registered owner of a sports utility vehicle (SUV) for allegedly using unauthorized red and blue blinker...

item.title: US Pledges $100 Million for Repairs of Chernobyl Nuclear Containment Shelter
item.description: The United States has announced a contribution of $100 million to aid in repairing the damaged containment dome at the Chernobyl nuclear plant in northern Ukraine. The plant, known for the catastrophi...

item.title: Featured Filipino Word of the Day: ‘Mekeni’ and Its Meaning
item.description: The ABS-CBN Lifestyle section highlights its “Word of the Day” feature for May 4, 2026, focusing on the term “mekeni.” While the article itself provides minimal expanded discussion, this daily feature...

item.title: ASX set to open lower as investors await RBA interest rate announcement
item.description: The Australian sharemarket is projected to open lower on Monday as investors await the Reserve Bank of Australia's upcoming board meeting. The market anticipates a third consecutive cash rate rise, wi...

item.title: ITV's Scheduling Issues Continue to Affect Coronation Street and Emmerdale Viewers
item.description: Viewers of ITV's long-running soap operas, Coronation Street and Emmerdale, are facing continued scheduling disruptions as the broadcaster's recent programming changes have clashed with major sporting...

item.title: Leinster Secure Place in Champions Cup Final After Hard-Fought Semi-Final Win Over Toulon
item.description: Leinster Rugby have booked their spot in the Champions Cup final after a tense 29-25 victory over RC Toulon in the semifinal at Lansdowne Road, Dublin. Despite being reduced to 13 men in the first hal...

item.title: US to Escort Ships Through Strait of Hormuz Amid Rising Tensions, Trump Issues Force Warning
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced a mission to escort ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil chokepoint, prompting concern over potential escalation in the Middle East. The opera...

item.title: Team Nigeria Qualifies Additional Athletes for World Athletics Championships
item.description: For the final day of the World Relay Championships wey hold for Gaborone, Botswana, Team Nigeria show say dem still dey competitive. The 4x100m mixed relay team don already qualify, and on this day, t...

item.title: Thousands of Cancer Patients to Gain Access to a Quick NHS Injection
item.description: A new NHS jab that can be administered in just one minute is set to benefit tens of thousands of cancer patients. The jab is designed to help treat or manage specific forms of cancer more efficiently,...

item.title: Winnipeg patient faces multiple charges after assaulting hospital staff
item.description: A 59-year-old man has been arrested and charged after allegedly assaulting three health-care workers at Grace Hospital in Winnipeg between April 30 and May 1, 2026. According to police, the man exhibi...

item.title: A stranger’s small act of kindness helped me through severe back pain
item.description: While dealing with excruciating back pain, the author recounts an experience that left a lasting impression. After picking up a box of books at work, their back suddenly gave way, causing agony so sev...

item.title: Madeleine McCann's parents and siblings attend vigil on 19th anniversary of her disappearance
item.description: On the 19th anniversary of Madeleine McCann’s disappearance, her parents Kate and Gerry joined a prayer vigil in their home village of Rothley, Leicestershire, alongside their twins Sean and Amelie, n...

item.title: Daily Feng Shui Insights by Master Hanz Cua for May 4, 2026
item.description: Master Hanz Cua, a renowned feng shui expert, shares his insights and predictions for May 4, 2026. His guidance focuses on energy alignment, auspicious activities, and potential challenges that Filipi...

item.title: Labour Party announces 2027 primary election fees and schedule
item.description: The Labour Party (LP) don announce how much dem go charge for their 2027 election forms and don also fix dates for their primaries. According to the party National Publicity Secretary, Ken Asogwa, pre...

item.title: Cardoso prioritises results as Sundowns extend lead with convincing win over Polokwane City
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso expressed satisfaction with both the result and key player returns after his side secured a comfortable 3-0 win over Polokwane City at Loftus Versfeld. The victo...

item.title: Vancouver police issue warning after attempted Scientology speedrunning event
item.description: Vancouver police have issued a public warning following a recent attempt at 'Scientology speedrunning', an unusual and potentially risky activity linked to the Church of Scientology. The event, which ...

item.title: Basilica clarifies it was not informed of TVK leader Vijay’s early morning visit
item.description: The Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health in Velankanni has issued a statement clarifying that it was not informed about TVK chief Vijay's planned visit to the shrine on May 2, 2026. Parish priest Rev. ...
